section: H1:PRIVACY POLICY INFORMATION ON THE PROCESSING OF PERSONAL DATA PURSUANT TO ARTICLES 13-14 OF REGULATION (EU) 2016/679 > H2:Data Controller
sentence: This Policy may be subject to updates. The published version indicates the date of the last update: February 6, 2026. Please consult the Policy periodically.
